name: Google SERP + AI Search Intelligence API
description: Extract real-time Google Search results including organic listings, 'People Also Ask' questions, and AI Overviews (SGE). High-reliability extraction via mobile carrier proxies.

pricing.comparison: SerpApi charges $0.01/search. Bright Data SERP API: $0.003/req but often blocks SGE content. Our service provides full AI Overviews and mobile-first results via x402 micropayments.

whyMobileProxy: Google aggressively blocks datacenter IPs and serves different results based on browser fingerprinting. AI Overviews (SGE) are more frequently triggered on mobile carrier IPs. Mobile proxies from Proxies.sx ensure 99% bypass of CAPTCHAs and authentic mobile search results.
limitations: AI Overviews trigger based on Google's internal logic
